system_prompt:
You are an expert VLSI Verification Engineer. Your task is to perform Fault Localization and RTL Repair. Analyze the provided Error Symptom, the FULL Raw VCD Trace, and Raw Verilog code. 
You must output a JSON object with exactly three keys:
1. "buggy_line": The exact integer line number from the Raw Verilog where the defect exists.
2. "root_cause": A 1-2 sentence explanation of why the logic failed at the failing timestamp.
3. "fixed_code": The corrected single line (or block) of Verilog code.

  10: module design_4(
  11: 	input [31:0] a_operand,
  12: 	input [31:0] b_operand,
  13: 	input [3:0] Operation,
  14: 	output [31:0] ALU_Output,
  15: 	output Exception,Overflow,Underflow
  16: 	);

  18: 
  19: wire [31:0] Add_Sub_A,Add_Sub_B,Mul_A,Mul_B,Div_A,Div_B,OR_Output,AND_Output,XOR_Output,L_S_Output,R_S_Output,Floating_Point;
  20: 
  21: wire Add_Sub_Exception,Mul_Exception,Mul_Overflow,Mul_Underflow,Div_Exception;
  22: 
  23: wire [31:0] Add_Sub_Output,Mul_Output,Div_Output,Integer_Value;

  26:

  31: assign {Add_Sub_A,Add_Sub_B,AddBar_Sub} = (Operation == 4'd10) ? {a_operand,b_operand,1'b0} : 65'dz;
  32: 
  33: assign {Mul_A,Mul_B} = (Operation == 4'd1) ? {a_operand,b_operand} : 64'dz;
  34: 
  35: assign {Div_A,Div_B} = (Operation == 4'd2) ? {a_operand,b_operand}	: 64'dz;
  36: 
  37: assign {Add_Sub_A,Add_Sub_B,AddBar_Sub} = (Operation == 4'd3) ? {a_operand,b_operand,1'b1} : 65'dz;
  38: 
  39: assign OR_Output = (Operation == 4'd4) ? a_operand | b_operand	: 32'dz;
  40: 
  41: assign AND_Output = (Operation == 4'd5) ? a_operand & b_operand	: 32'dz;
  42: 
  43: assign XOR_Output = (Operation == 4'd6) ? a_operand ^ b_operand: 32'dz;
  44: 
  45: assign L_S_Output = (Operation == 4'd7) ? a_operand << 1'b1 : 32'dz;
  46: 
  47: assign R_S_Output = (Operation == 4'd8) ? a_operand >> 1'b1	: 32'dz;
  48: 
  49: assign Floating_Point = (Operation == 4'd9) ? a_operand	: 32'dz;
  50: 
  51: assign Complement_output = (Operation == 4'd11) ? !a_operand : 32'dz;

 102: module Addition_Subtraction(
 103: input [31:0] a_operand,b_operand, //Inputs in the format of IEEE-754 Representation.
 104: input AddBar_Sub,				  //If Add_Sub is low then Addition else Subtraction.
 105: output Exception,
 106: output [31:0] result              //Outputs in the format of IEEE-754 Representation.
 107: );
 108: 
 109: wire operation_sub_addBar;
 110: wire Comp_enable;
 111: wire output_sign;
 112: 
 113: wire [31:0] operand_a,operand_b;
 114: wire [23:0] significand_a,significand_b;
 115: wire [7:0] exponent_diff;
 116: 
 117: 
 118: wire [23:0] significand_b_add_sub;
 119: wire [7:0] exponent_b_add_sub;
 120: 
 121: wire [24:0] significand_add;
 122: wire [30:0] add_sum;
 123: 
 124: wire [23:0] significand_sub_complement;
 125: wire [24:0] significand_sub;
 126: wire [30:0] sub_diff;
 127: wire [24:0] subtraction_diff;
 128: wire [7:0] exponent_sub;
 129: 
 130: //for operations always operand_a must not be less than b_operand
 131: assign {Comp_enable,operand_a,operand_b} = (a_operand[30:0] < b_operand[30:0]) ? {1'b1,b_operand,a_operand} : {1'b0,a_operand,b_operand};
 132: 
 133: assign exp_a = operand_a[30:23];
 134: assign exp_b = operand_b[30:23];
 135: 
 136: //Exception flag sets 1 if either one of the exponent is 255.
 137: assign Exception = (&operand_a[30:23]) | (&operand_b[30:23]);
 138: 
 139: assign output_sign = AddBar_Sub ? Comp_enable ? !operand_a[31] : operand_a[31] : operand_a[31] ;
 140: 
 141: assign operation_sub_addBar = AddBar_Sub ? operand_a[31] ^ operand_b[31] : ~(operand_a[31] ^ operand_b[31]);
 142: 
 143: //Assigining significand values according to Hidden Bit.
 144: //If exponent is equal to zero then hidden bit will be 0 for that respective significand else it will be 1
 145: assign significand_a = (|operand_a[30:23]) ? {1'b1,operand_a[22:0]} : {1'b0,operand_a[22:0]};
 146: assign significand_b = (|operand_b[30:23]) ? {1'b1,operand_b[22:0]} : {1'b0,operand_b[22:0]};
 147: 
 148: //Evaluating Exponent Difference
 149: assign exponent_diff = operand_a[30:23] - operand_b[30:23];
 150: 
 151: //Shifting significand_b according to exponent_diff
 152: assign significand_b_add_sub = significand_b >> exponent_diff;
 153: 
 154: assign exponent_b_add_sub = operand_b[30:23] + exponent_diff;
 155: 
 156: //Checking exponents are same or not
 157: assign perform = (operand_a[30:23] == exponent_b_add_sub);
 158: 
 159: ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
 160: //------------------------------------------------ADD BLOCK------------------------------------------//
 161: 
 162: assign significand_add = (perform & operation_sub_addBar) ? (significand_a + significand_b_add_sub) : 25'd0;
 163: 
 164: //Result will be equal to Most 23 bits if carry generates else it will be Least 22 bits.
 165: assign add_sum[22:0] = significand_add[24] ? significand_add[23:1] : significand_add[22:0];
 166: 
 167: //If carry generates in sum value then exponent must be added with 1 else feed as it is.
 168: assign add_sum[30:23] = significand_add[24] ? (1'b1 + operand_a[30:23]) : operand_a[30:23];
 169: 
 170: ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
 171: //------------------------------------------------SUB BLOCK------------------------------------------//
 172: 
 173: assign significand_sub_complement = (perform & !operation_sub_addBar) ? ~(significand_b_add_sub) + 24'd1 : 24'd0 ;
 174: 
 175: assign significand_sub = perform ? (significand_a + significand_sub_complement) : 25'd0;
 176: 
 177: priority_encoder pe(significand_sub,operand_a[30:23],subtraction_diff,exponent_sub);
 178: 
 179: assign sub_diff[30:23] = exponent_sub;
 180: 
 181: assign sub_diff[22:0] = subtraction_diff[22:0];
 182: 
 183: ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
 184: //-------------------------------------------------OUTPUT--------------------------------------------//
 185: 
 186: //If there is no exception and operation will evaluate
 187: 
 188: 
 189: assign result = Exception ? 32'b0 : ((!operation_sub_addBar) ? {output_sign,sub_diff} : {output_sign,add_sum});
 190: 
 191: endmodule

 360: module Division(
 361: 	input [31:0] a_operand,
 362: 	input [31:0] b_operand,
 363: 	output Exception,
 364: 	output [31:0] result
 365: );
 366: 
 367: wire sign;
 368: wire [7:0] shift;
 369: wire [7:0] exponent_a;
 370: wire [31:0] divisor;
 371: wire [31:0] operand_a;
 372: wire [31:0] Intermediate_X0;
 373: wire [31:0] Iteration_X0;
 374: wire [31:0] Iteration_X1;
 375: wire [31:0] Iteration_X2;
 376: wire [31:0] Iteration_X3;
 377: wire [31:0] solution;
 378: 
 379: wire [31:0] denominator;
 380: wire [31:0] operand_a_change;
 381: 
 382: assign Exception = (&a_operand[30:23]) | (&b_operand[30:23]);
 383: 
 384: assign sign = a_operand[31] ^ b_operand[31];
 385: 
 386: assign shift = 8'd126 - b_operand[30:23];
 387: 
 388: assign divisor = {1'b0,8'd126,b_operand[22:0]};
 389: 
 390: assign denominator = divisor;
 391: 
 392: assign exponent_a = a_operand[30:23] + shift;
 393: 
 394: assign operand_a = {a_operand[31],exponent_a,a_operand[22:0]};
 395: 
 396: assign operand_a_change = operand_a;
 397: 
 398: //32'hC00B_4B4B = (-37)/17
 399: Multiplication x0(.a_operand(32'hC00B_4B4B),.b_operand(divisor),.result(Intermediate_X0));
 400: 
 401: //32'h4034_B4B5 = 48/17
 402: Addition_Subtraction X0(.a_operand(Intermediate_X0),.b_operand(32'h4034_B4B5),.AddBar_Sub(1'b0),.result(Iteration_X0));
 403: 
 404: Iteration X1(Iteration_X0,divisor,Iteration_X1);
 405: 
 406: Iteration X2(Iteration_X1,divisor,Iteration_X2);
 407: 
 408: Iteration X3(Iteration_X2,divisor,Iteration_X3);
 409: 
 410: Multiplication END(.a_operand(Iteration_X3),.b_operand(operand_a),.result(solution));
 411: 
 412: assign result = {sign,solution[30:0]};
 413: endmodule

 417: module Iteration(
 418: 	input [31:0] operand_1,
 419: 	input [31:0] operand_2,
 420: 	output [31:0] solution
 421: 	);
 422: 
 423: wire [31:0] Intermediate_Value1,Intermediate_Value2;
 424: 
 425: Multiplication M1(.a_operand(operand_1),.b_operand(operand_2),.result(Intermediate_Value1));
 426: 
 427: //32'h4000_0000 -> 2.
 428: Addition_Subtraction A1(.a_operand(32'h4000_0000),.b_operand({1'b1,Intermediate_Value1[30:0]}),.AddBar_Sub(1'b0),.result(Intermediate_Value2));
 429: 
 430: Multiplication M2(.a_operand(operand_1),.b_operand(Intermediate_Value2),.result(solution));
 431: 
 432: endmodule

 435: module Multiplication(
 436: 		input [31:0] a_operand,
 437: 		input [31:0] b_operand,
 438: 		output Exception,Overflow,Underflow,
 439: 		output [31:0] result
 440: 		);
 441: 
 442: wire sign,product_round,normalised,zero;
 443: wire [8:0] exponent,sum_exponent;
 444: wire [22:0] product_mantissa;
 445: wire [23:0] operand_a,operand_b;
 446: wire [47:0] product,product_normalised; //48 Bits
 447: 
 448: 
 449: assign sign = a_operand[31] ^ b_operand[31];
 450: 
 451: //Exception flag sets 1 if either one of the exponent is 255.
 452: assign Exception = (&a_operand[30:23]) | (&b_operand[30:23]);
 453: 
 454: //Assigining significand values according to Hidden Bit.
 455: //If exponent is equal to zero then hidden bit will be 0 for that respective significand else it will be 1
 456: 
 457: assign operand_a = (|a_operand[30:23]) ? {1'b1,a_operand[22:0]} : {1'b0,a_operand[22:0]};
 458: 
 459: assign operand_b = (|b_operand[30:23]) ? {1'b1,b_operand[22:0]} : {1'b0,b_operand[22:0]};
 460: 
 461: assign product = operand_a * operand_b;			//Calculating Product
 462: 
 463: assign product_round = |product_normalised[22:0];  //Ending 22 bits are OR'ed for rounding operation.
 464: 
 465: assign normalised = product[47] ? 1'b1 : 1'b0;
 466: 
 467: assign product_normalised = normalised ? product : product << 1;	//Assigning Normalised value based on 48th bit
 468: 
 469: //Final Manitssa.
 470: assign product_mantissa = product_normalised[46:24] + {21'b0,(product_normalised[23] & product_round)};
 471: 
 472: assign zero = Exception ? 1'b0 : (product_mantissa == 23'd0) ? 1'b1 : 1'b0;
 473: 
 474: assign sum_exponent = a_operand[30:23] + b_operand[30:23];
 475: 
 476: assign exponent = sum_exponent - 8'd127 + normalised;
 477: 
 478: assign Overflow = ((exponent[8] & exponent[7]) & !zero) ; //If overall exponent is greater than 255 then Overflow condition.
 479: //Exception Case when exponent reaches its maximu value that is 384.
 480: 
 481: //If sum of both exponents is less than 127 then Underflow condition.
 482: assign Underflow = ((exponent[8] & exponent[7]) & !zero) ? 1'b1 : 1'b0;
 483: 
 484: assign result = Exception ? 32'd0 : zero ? {sign,31'd0} : Overflow ? {sign,8'hFF,23'd0} : Underflow ? {sign,31'd0} : {sign,exponent[7:0],product_mantissa};
